title: centranthus ruber var. velenovskyi
intro: Centranthus ruber var. velenovskyi, also known as Red Valerian, is a variety of flowering plant in the valerian family, characterized by its bright red flowers and pinkish-red calyx. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Red Valerian include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve mood. In herbal preparations, Red Valerian is often combined with other herbs and used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
